query:
SELECT 
  f.id,
  f.leadId,
  f.corretorId,
  f.dataFollowUp,
  f.status,
  l.nome as leadNome,
  l.telefone,
  l.email
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
WHERE f.corretorId = 5055943
  AND f.status = 'pendente'
  AND DATE(f.dataFollowUp) = '2026-01-14'
LIMIT 5;
